items.headline: Bloom Energy (BE) Lands $5 Billion AI Power Deal And Wyoming Offtake Project
items.summary: Bloom Energy (NYSE:BE) has entered a US$5b global AI infrastructure partnership with Brookfield focused on powering data centers. The company has agreed to a US$2.65b, 20-year offtake project with American Electric Power for a fuel cell facility in Wyoming. These agreements frame Bloom Energy as an onsite power supplier for large AI factories with multi-gigawatt, long-duration contracts. Bloom Energy sits at the intersection of distributed power generation and the rapid buildout of AI data...

items.headline: Today’s AI market hits all 5 warning signs that preceded 2000 Nasdaq crash.
items.summary: Although Wall Street has spent the better part of two years cheering an artificial intelligence buildout that has dragged the Nasdaq 100 up roughly 30% over the past year, the technology-packed Nasdaq Composite is starting to wobble at the worst possible moment.
